headline: Assessing Crown Castle (CCI) Valuation As Shares Rebound And Fiber Sale Plans Take Shape
summary: Recent performance and business snapshot Crown Castle (CCI) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up 0.9% over the past day, 2.6% over the past week, and 7.3% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, Crown Castle is up 12.6%, while the 1 year total return is a 7.7% decline. The 3 year total return shows a 7.9% decline and the 5 year total return reflects a 35.9% decline.
